title: aliciella lottiae
intro: Aliciella lottiae, also known as Lott's aliciella, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Aliciella lottiae is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in small quantities due to its rarity.
